Therefore the maximum total is achieved at\n// the maximum affordable purchase.\nghost predicate IsMaxChocolateResult(s: int, a: int, b: int, c: int, ans: int)\n  requires s >= 0 && a > 0 && b >= 0 && c > 0\n{\n  var bought := s / c;\n  // (1) This purchase is affordable\n  IsAffordable(bought, s, c)\n  // (2) Cannot afford one more bar — bought is the maximum purchase\n  && !IsAffordable(bought + 1, s, c)\n  // (3) The answer equals the total bars from this maximum purchase\n  && ans == TotalChocolate(bought, a, b)\n  // (4) Non-decreasing at boundary: buying fewer gives no more total\n  && (bought == 0 || TotalChocolate(bought, a, b) >= TotalChocolate(bought - 1, a, b))\n}\n\nmethod VasyaAndChocolate(t: int, cases: seq<(int, int, int, int)>) returns (results: seq<int>)\n  requires t >= 0\n  requires |cases| >= t\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < t ::\n    cases[i].0 >= 0 && cases[i].1 > 0 && cases[i].2 >= 0 && cases[i].3 > 0\n  ensures |results| == t\n  ensures forall i | 0 <= i < t ::\n    IsMaxChocolateResult(cases[i].0, cases[i].1, cases[i].2, cases[i].3, results[i])\n{\n  results := [];\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < t\n  {\n    var (s, a, b, c) := cases[i];\n    var n := s / c;\n    var x := n / a;\n    var ans := n + x * b;\n    results := results + [ans];\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n}","numLines":59,"startLine":1,"totalLines":59}}},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"allowed","resetsAt":1773788400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","overageStatus":"rejected","overageDisabledReason":"org_level_disabled","isUsingOverage":false},"uuid":"99140119-e357-4567-9ae8-e5351b2e6672","session_id":"0163beab-c154-4491-87ac-0a0572fc056b"},{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_018cEZcB38mPTfHG3qfD7uAk","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Let me analyze what's needed:\n\n1. c > 0\n{\n  var bought := s / c;\n  // (1) This purchase is affordable\n  IsAffordable(bought, s, c)\n  // (2) Cannot afford one more bar — bought is the maximum purchase\n  && !IsAffordable(bought + 1, s, c)\n  // (3) The answer equals the total bars from this maximum purchase\n  && ans == TotalChocolate(bought, a, b)\n  // (4) Non-decreasing at boundary: buying fewer gives no more total\n  && (bought == 0 || TotalChocolate(bought, a, b) >= TotalChocolate(bought - 1, a, b))\n}\n\nlemma FloorDivNonDecreasing(n: int, a: int)\n  requires n > 0\n  requires a > 0\n  ensures n / a >= (n - 1) / a\n{\n}\n\nlemma TotalChocolateNonDecreasing(bought: int, a: int, b: int)\n  requires bought > 0\n  requires a > 0\n  requires b >= 0\n  ensures TotalChocolate(bought, a, b) >= TotalChocolate(bought - 1, a, b)\n{\n  FloorDivNonDecreasing(bought, a);\n  assert bought / a >= (bought - 1) / a;\n  assert (bought / a - (bought - 1) / a) * b >= 0;\n}\n\nmethod VasyaAndChocolate(t: int, cases: seq<(int, 0\n  ensures |results| == t\n  ensures forall i | 0 <= i < t ::\n    IsMaxChocolateResult(cases[i].0, cases[i].1, cases[i].2, cases[i].3, results[i])\n{\n  results := [];\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < t\n    invariant 0 <= i <= t\n    invariant |results| == i\n    invariant forall j | 0 <= j < i ::\n      IsMaxChocolateResult(cases[j].0, cases[j].1, cases[j].2, cases[j].3, results[j])\n  {\n    var (s, a, b, c) := cases[i];\n    var n := s / c;\n    var x := n / a;\n    var ans := n + x * b;\n\n    assert n >= 0;\n    assert n * c <= s;\n    assert IsAffordable(n, s, c);\n\n    assert (n + 1) * c > s;\n    assert !IsAffordable(n + 1, s, c);\n\n    assert ans == TotalChocolate(n, a, b);\n\n    if n > 0 {\n      TotalChocolateNonDecreasing(n, a, b);\n    }\n\n    assert IsMaxChocolateResult(s, a, b, c, ans);\n\n    results := results + [ans];\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1180,"cache_read_input_tokens":18637,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1180},"output_tokens":10,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0163beab-c154-4491-87ac-0a0572fc056b","uuid":"bbdc4729-367a-4238-90ff-5796c53dc621"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Wi9e9Kbs4du3mUVxujMzAY","type":"tool_result","content":"File 1) / a\n{\n}","newString":"lemma FloorDivNonDecreasing(n: int, a: int)\n  requires n > 0\n  requires a > 0\n  ensures n / a >= (n - 1) / a\n{\n  var q := (n - 1) / a;\n  assert q * a <= n - 1;\n  assert q * a < n;\n  if n / a < q {\n    assert n / a <= q - 1;\n    assert n == (n / a) * a + (n % a);\n    assert n % a < a;\n    assert n <= (q - 1) * a + (a - 1);\n    assert n <= q * a - 1;\n    assert false;\n  }\n}","originalFile":"// Total chocolate bars when buying exactly `bought` bars under the\n// \"buy a, get b free\" offer (usable any number of times).\n// Each complete group of `a` purchased bars yields `b` free bars.\nghost function TotalChocolate(bought: int, a: int, b: int): int\n  requires bought >= 0\n  requires a > 0\n{\n  bought + (bought / a) * b\n}\n\n// Whether purchasing `bought` bars is affordable with budget `s` at price `c` each.\nghost predicate IsAffordable(bought: int, s: int, c: int)\n  requires c > 0\n{\n  bought >= 0 && bought * c <= s\n}\n\n// The answer `ans` is the maximum total chocolate bars obtainable with budget `s`,\n// bar price `c`, and the \"buy `a` get `b` free\" offer.\n//\n// Optimality argument: TotalChocolate is strictly non-decreasing in `bought`\n// (each additional bar bought adds at least 1 to the total, since floor(n/a)\n// is non-decreasing and b >= 0). Therefore the maximum total is achieved at\n// the maximum affordable purchase.\nghost predicate IsMaxChocolateResult(s: int, a: int, b: int, c: int, ans: int)\n  requires s >= 0 && a > 0 && b >= 0 && c > 0\n{\n  var bought := s / c;\n  // (1) This purchase is affordable\n  IsAffordable(bought, s, c)\n  // (2) Cannot afford one more bar — bought is the maximum purchase\n  && !IsAffordable(bought + 1, s, c)\n  // (3) The answer equals the total bars from this maximum purchase\n  && ans == TotalChocolate(bought, a, b)\n  // (4) Non-decreasing at boundary: buying fewer gives no more total\n  && (bought == 0 || TotalChocolate(bought, a, b) >= TotalChocolate(bought - 1, a, b))\n}\n\nlemma FloorDivNonDecreasing(n: int, a: int)\n  requires n > 0\n  requires a > 0\n  ensures n / a >= (n - 1) / a\n{\n}\n\nlemma TotalChocolateNonDecreasing(bought: int, a: int, b: int)\n  requires bought > 0\n  requires a > 0\n  requires b >= 0\n  ensures TotalChocolate(bought, a, b) >= TotalChocolate(bought - 1, a, b)\n{\n  FloorDivNonDecreasing(bought, a);\n  assert bought / a >= (bought - 1) / a;\n  assert (bought / a - (bought - 1) / a) * b >= 0;\n}\n\nmethod VasyaAndChocolate(t: int, cases: seq<(int, int, int, int)>) returns (results: seq<int>)\n  requires t >= 0\n  requires |cases| >= t\n  requires forall i | 0 <= i < t ::\n    cases[i].0 >= 0 && cases[i].1 > 0 && cases[i].2 >= 0 && cases[i].3 > 0\n  ensures |results| == t\n  ensures forall i | 0 <= i < t ::\n    IsMaxChocolateResult(cases[i].0, cases[i].1, cases[i].2, cases[i].3, results[i])\n{\n  results := [];\n  var i := 0;\n  while i < t\n    invariant 0 <= i <= t\n    invariant |results| == i\n    invariant forall j | 0 <= j < i ::\n      IsMaxChocolateResult(cases[j].0, cases[j].1, cases[j].2, cases[j].3, results[j])\n  {\n    var (s, a, b, c) := cases[i];\n    var n := s / c;\n    var x := n / a;\n    var ans := n + x * b;\n\n    assert n >= 0;\n    assert n * c <= s;\n    assert IsAffordable(n, s, c);\n\n    assert (n + 1) * c > s;\n    assert !IsAffordable(n + 1, s, c);\n\n    assert ans == TotalChocolate(n, a, b);\n\n    if n > 0 {\n      TotalChocolateNonDecreasing(n, a, b);\n    }\n\n    assert IsMaxChocolateResult(s, a, b, c, ans);\n\n    results := results + [ans];\n    i := i + 1;\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":41,"oldLines":6,"newStart":41,"newLines":17,"lines":["   requires a > 0","   ensures n / a >= (n - 1) / a"," {","+  var q := (n - 1) / a;","+  assert q * a <= n - 1;","+  assert q * a < n;","+  if n / a < q {","+    assert n / a <= q - 1;","+    assert n == (n / a) * a + (n % a);","+    assert n % a < a;","+    assert n <= (q - 1) * a + (a - 1);","+    assert n <= q * a - 1;","+    assert false;","+  }"," }"," "," lemma TotalChocolateNonDecreasing(bought: int, a: int, b: int)"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}},{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_016yug4mt4o1QM6DtR3iic9x","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Nb2D3C5jVyr7kNDwUDZcmz","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"/opt/homebrew/Cellar/dotnet@8/8.0.124/libexec/dotnet /Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/dafny-source/Binaries/Dafny.dll verify /Users/mchiesa/work/projects/2026-02-dafny-liftings/smt_analysis/results/0023_1065_A/verified.dfy --verification-time-limit 60 2>&1","description":"Verify the Dafny program (attempt 2)","timeout":120000},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":4040,"cache_read_input_tokens":24481,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":4040},"output_tokens":26,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0163beab-c154-4491-87ac-0a0572fc056b","uuid":"24717ed0-66c2-4d6f-a6f5-8f8d4940472b"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Nb2D3C5jVyr7kNDwUDZcmz","type":"tool_result","content":"Dafny program verifier finished with 8 verified, 0 errors","is_error":false}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"0163beab-c154-4491-87ac-0a0572fc056b","uuid":"e23c297c-0eb0-4076-9afa-0cf4ebf70726","timestamp":"2026-03-17T19:10:59.826Z","tool_use_result":{"stdout":"Dafny program verifier finished with 8 verified, 0 errors","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false}},{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01CGNJzgDomeY63svkDxc5kk","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"All 8 verification conditions passed.
